name: Valkyrie Brunhilde
name_jp: ワルキューレ・ヴリュンヒルデ
desc: Unaffected by your opponent's Spell effects. Gains 500 ATK for each monster your opponent controls. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can have this card lose exactly 1000 DEF, and if you do, your "Valkyrie" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.
mnst_eff: Unaffected by your opponent's Spell effects. Gains 500 ATK for each monster your opponent controls. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can have this card lose exactly 1000 DEF, and if you do, your "Valkyrie" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.
eff: Unaffected by your opponent's Spell effects. Gains 500 ATK for each monster your opponent controls. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can have this card lose exactly 1000 DEF, and if you do, your "Valkyrie" monsters cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.

mst: Unaffected by the opponent's Spell Cards
